content: Self-Refine’s stateless, iteration-focused self-improvement for LLM outputs can be paired with Reflexion’s dynamic long-term memory to create a hierarchical self-improvement system, where low-level task output refinement draws on accumulated high-level self-reflection memories to avoid repeating past mistakes across unrelated tasks. This framework retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while solving its limitation of failing to carry improvement insights across multiple different tasks.
